requests.prompt: App Store screenshot for a wellness alarm app. iPhone 6.5 inch (1290x2796) aspect ratio, vertical. Background: warm cream (#FAF7F2) with a subtle gradient to soft orange at the bottom. Center: stylized phone screen mockup with rounded corners showing a sunrise icon and the text 'Good morning.'. Above the phone, large bold sans-serif headline: 'Start your day'. Below the phone, smaller text: 'with intention.' Bottom corner: small logo 'Morning Ritual' with a tiny sun icon. Aesthetic: minimalist, wellness app, calm, premium, warm color palette #FF6B35 and #FAF7F2. No fake app icons, no fake notifications, just clean typography and the sunrise symbol.
